description: AIOSON Brain Index — agent procedural memory (quality-scored patterns). Load this first, then load specific brain files only when relevant tags match.
loading_strategy: tiered — this index is always loaded (~2KB); brain files loaded on-demand by tag match

brains.desc: CSS/animation/interaction patterns learned from real site cloning — quality-scored, anti-pattern aware
Implementation patterns @dev defaults to — security, shell discipline, git mechanics, editing hygiene, validated-slice loop
Architecture and process decisions @sheldon defaults to — workspace/template parity, classification gates, validator sandbox, discovery-before-architecture, CLI-first integration
